problems.title: Two sum
problems.summary: Given an array of integers and a target, return the indices of the two numbers that add up to the target.

problems.title: Roman to Integer
problems.summary: Given a Roman numeral string, convert it to its integer value.

problems.title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
problems.summary: Given the heads of two sorted linked lists, merge them into one sorted linked list and return its head.

problems.title: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
problems.summary: Given a sorted array, remove duplicates in place and return the number of unique elements.

problems.title: Length of Last Word
problems.summary: Given a string of words and spaces, return the length of its last word.

problems.title: Plus One
problems.summary: Given a non-negative integer represented as an array of digits, add one and return the resulting digits.

problems.title: Excel Sheet Column Number
problems.summary: Given an Excel column title, return its corresponding column number.

problems.title: Contains Duplicates
problems.summary: Given an integer array, return whether any value appears at least twice.

problems.title: Contains Duplicates II
problems.summary: Given an integer array and an integer k, return whether equal values appear within k indices of each other.

problems.title: Missing Number
problems.summary: Given n distinct numbers in the range [0, n], return the missing number.

problems.title: Counting Bits
problems.summary: Given an integer n, return an array where each entry contains the number of 1 bits for every value from 0 to n.

problems.title: Sum of Left Leaves
problems.summary: Given the root of a binary tree, return the sum of all left leaf nodes.

problems.title: Assign Cookies
problems.summary: Given children greed factors and cookie sizes, return the maximum number of children who can be satisfied.

problems.title: Can Place Flowers
problems.summary: Given a flowerbed and a number n, return whether n new flowers can be planted without using adjacent plots.

problems.title: Baseball Game
problems.summary: Given a list of baseball scoring operations, return the final total score after applying the rules.

problems.title: Binary Number with Alternating Bits
problems.summary: Given a positive integer, return whether its binary representation has alternating bits.

problems.title: Lemonade Change
problems.summary: Given the sequence of bills customers pay with, return whether you can provide correct change to every customer.

problems.title: Subtract the Prodcut and Sum of Digits of an Integer
problems.summary: Given an integer n, return the product of its digits minus the sum of its digits.

problems.title: Find Numbers with Even Number of Digits
problems.summary: Given an array of integers, return how many numbers contain an even number of digits.

problems.title: Kids With the Greatest Number of Candies
problems.summary: Given each child's candies and some extra candies, return which children could have the greatest number of candies.

problems.title: Shuffle the Array
problems.summary: Given an array in the form [x1,...,xn,y1,...,yn], return it shuffled as [x1,y1,x2,y2,...,xn,yn].

problems.title: Running Sum of 1d Array
problems.summary: Given an array, return its running sum where each element is the sum of all previous elements and itself.

problems.title: Number of Good Pairs
problems.summary: Given an integer array, return the number of good pairs with equal values and i < j.

problems.title: Sum of All Odd Length Subarrays
problems.summary: Given an array of positive integers, return the sum of all odd-length subarrays.

problems.title: Richest Customer Wealth
problems.summary: Given account balances for each customer across banks, return the maximum customer wealth.

problems.title: Maximum Units on a Truck
problems.summary: Given box types and a truck size, return the maximum total units that can be loaded onto the truck.

problems.title: Decode XORed Array
problems.summary: Given an XOR-encoded array and the first value, decode and return the original array.

problems.title: Build Array from Permutation
problems.summary: Given a zero-based permutation array, build and return the array ans where ans[i] = nums[nums[i]].

problems.title: Concatenation of Array
problems.summary: Given an integer array, return a new array formed by concatenating the array with itself.

problems.title: find Greatest Common Divisor of Array
problems.summary: Given an integer array, return the greatest common divisor of its smallest and largest values.

problems.title: Two Furthest Houses With Different Colors
problems.summary: Given the colors of houses in a row, return the maximum distance between two houses with different colors.

problems.title: Check if Every Row and Column Contains All Numbers
problems.summary: Given an n x n matrix, return whether every row and column contains all integers from 1 to n.

problems.title: Count Equal and Divisible Pairs in an Array
problems.summary: Given an array and an integer k, return the number of equal-value index pairs whose product is divisible by k.

problems.title: Find CLosest Number to Zero
problems.summary: Given an integer array, return the value closest to zero, preferring the larger value when tied.

problems.title: Number of Senior Citizens
problems.summary: Given encoded passenger detail strings, return how many passengers are older than 60.

problems.title: Apple Redistribution into Boxes
problems.summary: Given apple counts and box capacities, return the minimum number of boxes needed to hold all apples.

problems.title: Score of a String
problems.summary: Given a string, return the sum of absolute differences between adjacent character codes.

problems.title: Construct the Minimum Bitwise Array I
problems.summary: Given an integer array nums, build the minimum array ans such that ans[i] | (ans[i] + 1) equals nums[i], or use -1 if impossible.

problems.title: Most Frequent Vowel and Consonants
problems.summary: Given a lowercase string, return the sum of the highest vowel frequency and the highest consonant frequency.

problems.title: Trionic Array I
problems.summary: Given an integer array, return whether it can be split into strictly increasing, then strictly decreasing, then strictly increasing parts.

problems.title: Longest Balanced Substring I
problems.summary: Given a string, return the length of the longest substring where all distinct characters appear the same number of times.

problems.title: Reverse Integer
problems.summary: Given a signed 32-bit integer, return its digits reversed, or 0 if the reversed value overflows.

problems.title: Balance a Binary Search Tree
problems.summary: Given the root of a binary search tree, return a balanced binary search tree containing the same values.

problems.title: Longest Balanced Subarray I
problems.summary: Given an integer array, return the length of the longest subarray with the same number of distinct even and distinct odd values.
